$schema_note: Each entry has: id (stable), language, seed (the finding to record before the test), query (what to recall), expected (the seed.id that should be the top-1 hit). The benchmark seeds N findings into a temp workspace, then for each query asserts that the right seed lands in top_k. Recall@1, Recall@5, MRR are computed across all queries.

seeds.title: DuckDB transient lock retry with exponential backoff
seeds.content: When two processes write to the same DuckDB file, transient lock errors can occur. Wrap writes in a retry decorator with exponential backoff (0.2s base, 3 attempts). Detect transient errors by the message substrings 'could not set lock', 'database is locked', 'write-ahead log'.

seeds.title: Use fastembed as the default embedding provider
seeds.content: fastembed runs locally with ONNX, no API key required, ships small models like BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5 at 384 dimensions. This avoids vendor lock-in for the default install path.

seeds.title: Workspace-scoped DuckDB storage
seeds.content: Each repo gets its own .memory-graph/memory.duckdb file. Memory does not leak between projects. The workspace is resolved from MEMORY_GRAPH_WORKSPACE, CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR, CODEX_WORKSPACE_DIR, or PWD.

seeds.title: PageRank for influential node ranking
seeds.content: Knowledge graph nodes accumulate edges from auto-inference and manual kg_add_edge calls. PageRank scores let us surface the most-referenced decisions when an agent starts a session.

seeds.title: Auto-crystallize wiki on canonical promotion
seeds.content: When a draft KG node is promoted to canonical via reuse_count >= 3, a wiki page is automatically generated from its tldr/brief/summary fields. This closes the loop from raw finding to curated long-form documentation.

seeds.title: Consultas de ventas en Crystal Lakehouse
seeds.content: Las ventas operativas viven en gold_prd.gld_comercial.tbl_consolidado_ventas (876M filas). Usar siempre el MCP crystal-prd con prefijo lakehouse_, nunca fashionai-prd que es ecommerce externo.

seeds.title: Tráfico presencial en tiendas físicas
seeds.content: Los conteos de visitantes por tienda están en gold_prd.gld_tiendas.tbl_trafico_presencial. Se usa para análisis de conversión, no para ventas online.

seeds.title: Plan de migración entre proveedores de embedding
seeds.content: Cuando cambiamos de modelo de embeddings, los vectores almacenados quedan incompatibles porque cambian las dimensiones. La estrategia es re-embedear todo el contenido en sitio: el texto fuente se conserva, solo se reemplazan los vectores.

seeds.title: Filtrar siempre por part_number en MongoDB pipelines
seeds.content: Para consultas sobre productos en la colección de pipelines de MongoDB, el filtro principal es part_number. En colecciones *_runs adicionar status='succeeded' y ordenar created_at desc.

seeds.title: Auto-edge similarity threshold of 0.62
seeds.content: When record_finding embeds a new node, it creates RELATED_TO edges to existing nodes only when cosine similarity exceeds 0.62. Below this threshold the relationship is too speculative and would add noise to PageRank.

seeds.title: Schema v5 adds embedding_meta table
seeds.content: Schema version 5 introduces the embedding_meta table that records provider, model_name, dimensions, and active generation. This makes provider swaps detectable and reversible via the embedding_migrate tool.

seeds.title: Brandkit FashionAI vive en mcp/fashionai_brandkit
seeds.content: El paquete fashionai_brandkit contiene la identidad de marca: tonos, paletas, lineamientos editoriales para reportes. Se invoca como MCP via python -m fashionai_brandkit.mcp.server.

queries.query: how to fix duckdb concurrent write lock errors
default embedding model no api key needed
why does each project have its own memory database
how is the most important decision ranked in the knowledge graph
when does the wiki page get generated automatically
dónde están las ventas de Crystal
tabla de visitantes por tienda física
qué pasa con los vectores cuando cambio de modelo de embedding
paleta y tonos de marca para reportes
